title: 家电坏了
description_uz: «Xonamdagi konditsioner buzildi, kecha kechqurun to'satdan sovutmay qoldi.» — Ijarachi va uy egasi o'rtasidagi telefon suhbati. Texnika nosozligini tushuntirish, ustani chaqirish va ta'mirlash xarajatini kim qoplashini kelishishni mashq qiladi. Kundalik turmushga oid amaliy iboralar va xushmuomalalik shakllariga boy. Rollarni o'zaro almashib o'ynash hamda ovozli takrorlash uchun juda mos.
description_ru: «У меня в комнате сломался кондиционер, вчера вечером вдруг перестал охлаждать.» — Телефонный разговор между жильцом и хозяином квартиры. Здесь отрабатывается описание поломки, вызов мастера и обсуждение того, кто оплатит ремонт. Много полезных бытовых выражений и вежливых оборотов. Отлично подходит для ролевой игры и проговаривания вслух.
description_en: «The air conditioner in my room broke; last night it suddenly stopped cooling.» — A phone call between a tenant and a landlord. It practices describing an appliance fault, arranging a repairman, and settling who pays for the repair. Rich in everyday vocabulary and polite, considerate phrasing. Great for role-play and reading each line aloud until it flows.

sentences.text_original: 喂，房东您好！我是住在302的小李。
sentences.pinyin: Wèi, fángdōng nín hǎo! Wǒ shì zhù zài 302 de Xiǎo Lǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Allo, uy egasi, assalomu alaykum! Men 302-xonada yashaydigan Syao Liman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Алло, здравствуйте, хозяин! Я Сяо Ли, живу в 302-й.
sentences.text_translation_en: Hello, landlord! This is Xiao Li, living in 302.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 小李啊，怎么了？有什么事吗？
sentences.pinyin: Xiǎo Lǐ a, zěnme le? Yǒu shénme shì ma?
sentences.text_translation: Syao Li-ku, nima bo'ldi? Biror ishingiz bormi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А, Сяо Ли, что случилось? Что-то нужно?
sentences.text_translation_en: Oh, Xiao Li, what's wrong? Is something the matter?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 不好意思打扰您，我房间的空调坏了，昨天晚上突然不制冷了。
sentences.pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi dǎrǎo nín, wǒ fángjiān de kōngtiáo huài le, zuótiān wǎnshang tūrán bú zhìlěng le.
sentences.text_translation: Bezovta qilganim uchun uzr, xonamdagi konditsioner buzildi, kecha kechqurun to'satdan sovutmay qoldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Извините за беспокойство, у меня в комнате сломался кондиционер, вчера вечером вдруг перестал охлаждать.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sorry to bother you, the air conditioner in my room broke; last night it suddenly stopped cooling.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 是吗？你检查过遥控器设置了吗？是不是调到制热模式了？
sentences.pinyin: Shì ma? Nǐ jiǎnchá guo yáokòngqì shèzhì le ma? Shì bú shì tiáo dào zhìrè móshì le?
sentences.text_translation: Rostdanmi? Pultning sozlamalarini tekshirib ko'rdingmi? Isitish rejimiga o'tib qolmaganmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Правда? Ты проверял настройки пульта? Может, переключилось на режим обогрева?
sentences.text_translation_en: Really? Did you check the remote settings? Could it have been switched to heating mode?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我检查过了，模式没有问题，温度也调到二十二度了，但吹出来的风还是热的。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ jiǎnchá guo le, móshì méiyǒu wèntí, wēndù yě tiáo dào èrshí'èr dù le, dàn chuī chūlái de fēng háishì rè de.
sentences.text_translation: Tekshirib ko'rdim, rejimda muammo yo'q, haroratni ham yigirma ikki gradusga qo'ydim, lekin chiqayotgan shamol baribir issiq.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я проверял, с режимом всё в порядке, температуру выставил на двадцать два градуса, но воздух всё равно дует тёплый.
sentences.text_translation_en: I checked, the mode is fine, I even set the temperature to twenty-two degrees, but the air coming out is still warm.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那可能是压缩机出了问题。我下午找个师傅去看看，你在家吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nà kěnéng shì yāsuōjī chū le wèntí. Wǒ xiàwǔ zhǎo ge shīfu qù kàn kan, nǐ zài jiā ma?
sentences.text_translation: Unda kompressorda muammo bo'lsa kerak. Tushdan keyin ustani topib ko'rishga yuboraman, uydamisan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда, возможно, проблема в компрессоре. Я после обеда найду мастера, чтобы он посмотрел, ты дома?
sentences.text_translation_en: Then it might be a problem with the compressor. I'll find a repairman to take a look this afternoon, will you be home?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 下午两点到五点我都在家，您让师傅过来就行。
sentences.pinyin: Xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn dào wǔ diǎn wǒ dōu zài jiā, nín ràng shīfu guòlái jiù xíng.
sentences.text_translation: Tushdan keyin soat ikkidan beshgacha uyda bo'laman, ustani yuborsangiz bo'ldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: С двух до пяти дня я дома, просто пришлите мастера.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'll be home from two to five in the afternoon, just have the repairman come over.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好的，我打电话约一下维修师傅。如果今天修不好，我明天再安排别的空调给你。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ dǎ diànhuà yuē yíxià wéixiū shīfu. Rúguǒ jīntiān xiū bù hǎo, wǒ míngtiān zài ānpái bié de kōngtiáo gěi nǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, ta'mirlovchi ustaga qo'ng'iroq qilib kelishib olaman. Agar bugun tuzatib bo'lmasa, ertaga senga boshqa konditsioner topib beraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, я позвоню и договорюсь с мастером по ремонту. Если сегодня не починят, завтра подберу тебе другой кондиционер.
sentences.text_translation_en: Alright, I'll call and arrange with the repairman. If it can't be fixed today, I'll arrange a different air conditioner for you tomorrow.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 太感谢您了！那我等师傅来。
sentences.pinyin: Tài gǎnxiè nín le! Nà wǒ děng shīfu lái.
sentences.text_translation: Sizdan juda minnatdorman! Unda men ustani kutaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Большое вам спасибо! Тогда я подожду мастера.
sentences.text_translation_en: Thank you so much! Then I'll wait for the repairman to come.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对了，维修费用你放心，只要是自然损坏，都由我来承担。
sentences.pinyin: Duìle, wéixiū fèiyong nǐ fàngxīn, zhǐyào shì zìrán sǔnhuài, dōu yóu wǒ lái chéngdān.
sentences.text_translation: Aytmoqchi, ta'mirlash xarajatidan xavotir olma, agar tabiiy zararlanish bo'lsa, hammasini men qoplayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Кстати, насчёт стоимости ремонта не волнуйся, если это естественная поломка, всё беру на себя я.
sentences.text_translation_en: By the way, don't worry about the repair cost; as long as it's natural wear and tear, I'll cover it all.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好的，麻烦您了！
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, máfan nín le!
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, sizni ovora qildim!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, спасибо за беспокойство!
sentences.text_translation_en: Alright, thank you for your trouble!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 房东您好！维修师傅刚才来过了。
sentences.pinyin: Fángdōng nín hǎo! Wéixiū shīfu gāngcái lái guo le.
sentences.text_translation: Uy egasi, assalomu alaykum! Ta'mirlovchi usta hozirgina kelib ketdi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Здравствуйте, хозяин! Мастер по ремонту только что приходил.
sentences.text_translation_en: Hello, landlord! The repairman just came by.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 怎么样了？问题大吗？
sentences.pinyin: Zěnmeyàng le? Wèntí dà ma?
sentences.text_translation: Qanday bo'ldi? Muammo kattami?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ну как? Проблема серьёзная?
sentences.text_translation_en: How did it go? Is it a big problem?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 师傅说是缺氟了，加了氟以后空调现在已经能正常制冷了。
sentences.pinyin: Shīfu shuō shì quē fú le, jiā le fú yǐhòu kōngtiáo xiànzài yǐjīng néng zhèngcháng zhìlěng le.
sentences.text_translation: Usta freon yetishmagan dedi, freon qo'shgandan keyin konditsioner endi normal sovutyapti.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Мастер сказал, что не хватало фреона; после заправки фреоном кондиционер теперь нормально охлаждает.
sentences.text_translation_en: The repairman said it was low on refrigerant; after adding refrigerant the air conditioner can now cool normally.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那就好！总算修好了，这两天太热了，没空调确实受不了。
sentences.pinyin: Nà jiù hǎo! Zǒngsuàn xiū hǎo le, zhè liǎng tiān tài rè le, méi kōngtiáo quèshí shòu bù liǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi bo'libdi! Nihoyat tuzatildi, bu kunlari juda issiq, konditsionersiz haqiqatan ham chidab bo'lmaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ну и хорошо! Наконец-то починили, эти дни такие жаркие, без кондиционера и правда не вытерпеть.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's good! It's finally fixed; these past couple of days have been so hot, without an air conditioner it's really unbearable.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 是啊！谢谢您帮忙联系师傅。费用我已经跟师傅结清了。
sentences.pinyin: Shì a! Xièxie nín bāngmáng liánxì shīfu. Fèiyong wǒ yǐjīng gēn shīfu jiéqīng le.
sentences.text_translation: Ha-da! Usta bilan bog'lanishga yordam berganingiz uchun rahmat. Haqni men allaqachon usta bilan to'lab bo'ldim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да уж! Спасибо, что помогли связаться с мастером. Оплату я уже полностью рассчитал с мастером.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes! Thank you for helping to contact the repairman. I've already settled the cost with him.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 多少钱？我转给你。
sentences.pinyin: Duōshao qián? Wǒ zhuǎn gěi nǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Qancha pul bo'ldi? Senga o'tkazib beraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько вышло? Я тебе переведу.
sentences.text_translation_en: How much was it? I'll transfer it to you.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 不用了，一百五十块也不多，我自己出就行了。
sentences.pinyin: Búyòng le, yībǎi wǔshí kuài yě bù duō, wǒ zìjǐ chū jiù xíng le.
sentences.text_translation: Kerak emas, bir yuz ellik yuan ham ko'p emas, o'zim to'lasam bo'ldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не надо, сто пятьдесят юаней — это немного, я сам заплачу.
sentences.text_translation_en: No need, a hundred and fifty yuan isn't much, I'll just pay it myself.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那怎么行！说好了我承担的。你把收款码发给我，我马上转给你。
sentences.pinyin: Nà zěnme xíng! Shuō hǎo le wǒ chéngdān de. Nǐ bǎ shōukuǎn mǎ fā gěi wǒ, wǒ mǎshàng zhuǎn gěi nǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Bunday bo'lmaydi! Men qoplayman deb kelishib olgandik. To'lov QR-kodingni menga yubor, hozir o'tkazib yuboraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как же так! Мы договорились, что плачу я. Пришли мне свой QR-код для оплаты, я сейчас же переведу.
sentences.text_translation_en: That won't do! We agreed that I'd cover it. Send me your payment QR code, I'll transfer it right away.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那……好吧，谢谢房东！
sentences.pinyin: Nà …… hǎo ba, xièxie fángdōng!
sentences.text_translation: Unda…… mayli, rahmat uy egasi!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда…… ладно, спасибо, хозяин!
sentences.text_translation_en: Then…… alright, thank you, landlord!
sentences.speaker: A
